title: JSAUX 4K HDMI Cable 3M, Ultra High Speed 18Gbps HDMI 2.0 Cable Lead Support 4K@60Hz HDR, HDCP 2.2, 2160P, HD 1080P, Ethernet, 3D, ARC Compatible with Fire TV, Apple TV, PlayStation PS4 PS3 PC - Grey
features: 【4K HDR HDMI Cable】JSAUX HDMI 2.0 cable features advanced 4K Ultra HD technology. It supports resolutions up to 3840 * 2160 @ 60Hz with 18Gbps bandwidth, delivering richer colors and sharper images. Enjoy immersive entertainment with 3D support, up to 32 audio channels, and a sampling rate of 1536kHz (Also backward compatible with 1080P HD)

【High-Speed Data Capacity】This high-speed HDMI cable supports HDMI 2.0 features including Mirror & Extend modes, Ultra HD 4K 2160p (up to 60 Hz 4:4:4), HD 2K 1080p (up to 240 Hz), QHD 1440p (up to 144 Hz), HDCP 2.2, 3D, 48-bit Deep Color, Audio Return(ARC), and Dolby TrueHD 7.1 audio. No adapters or drivers needed—just plug and play. it’s an ideal companion for home theaters, game centers, conference rooms, and medical imagin

【Stable Signal Transmission】Engineered with an anti-interference design, this HDMI cable features 24K gold-plated connectors, built-in tinplate and durable zinc alloy shielding layers, minimizing signal loss and preventing screen flickering or blackouts. Unlike other cables that disrupt WiFi signals, this cable ensures full WiFi performance when connected

【Excellent HDMI Technology】: JSAUX has mature HDMI cable technology and a unique design. This HDMI to HDMI cable is compatible with Apple TV, Fire TV, CD/DVD/Blu-ray players, PS4/PS3, computers, and other HDMI supported devices, and connects them to 4K/HD TVs, monitors, or projectors

【Perfect 3M/10Ft Length】The 10FT HDMI Cable length offers greater flexibility for various setups, whether it's for your living room, office, or gaming station, Extra length, better fit for different spaces and scenarios
description: Product Description JSAUX 4K HDMI 2.0 Cable Previous page Next page 1 HDR 2 HDMI 2.0 3 3D Effect 4 4K@60Hz Previous page Next page 1 Multi-screen Mode 2 Extended Mode 3 Mirror Mode 4K/60Hz | 3D | 18Gbps | 32ch Audio — Cinematic immersion redefined HDMI 2.0 standard (Backward compatible with HDMI 1.4 | HDMI 1.3 | HDMI 1.2 | HDMI 1.1 | HDMI 1.0) This device must support HDR (Note: HDR requires device support - please verify your equipment's capability) Plug and Play
